as a part of closing procedures. As team lead I also handle projects such as

reworking the visual walls and dressing the mannequins as well as

  Responsible

include Receiving and inspecting incoming shipments of goods.Organizing

and storing inventory in designated locations within the warehouse. And

Primark, Brooklyn,NY — Overnight Replenishment Associate  

May 2023 - October 2023 

As a Replenishment Associate at Primark, my key duties typically include 
replenishing merchandise on the sales ﬂoor to maintain attractive and fully 
stocked displays. Monitoring inventory levels and identifying areas 
requiring restocking to meet customer demand.Efﬁciently unpacking and 
sorting incoming deliveries of merchandise.And ensuring accurate pricing 
and labeling of products before placing them on the sales ﬂoor.

June 2020 - August 2020 

While working as a counselor my duties included Supporting operations 
within the Arts and Theater Department by preparing necessary supplies 
and materials for camp activities. Provided guidance and instruction to

by offering support and encouragement throughout the artistic process.

coach_notes: To build a strong retail career, focus on developing graphic design skills like Adobe Creative Suite, Photoshop, and Illustrator, as these are highly valued for creating visual merchandising and marketing materials. Start by taking free online tutorials on platforms like YouTube or Coursera, then practice by designing simple posters or social media graphics for your current role. Your existing skills in brand management and computer basics provide a solid foundation—leverage them to showcase your new abilities in real projects.

jobs.title: Houseperson
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your experience with closing procedures, restocking, and teamwork directly align with houseperson duties like cleaning, stocking, and supporting operations.
jobs.gaps: No specific experience in hotel/hospitality settings, but transferable skills are strong.

jobs.title: (Part Time) Las Vegas South Premium Outlet Sales/Stock Stylist
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your restocking, pricing/labeling, customer orders, and teamwork experience directly match sales/stock stylist duties in a retail outlet.
jobs.gaps: No specific luxury or outlet retail experience, but skills are highly transferable.

jobs.title: Associate Website Designer
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: You have design and creative skills, and basic computer proficiency, which are foundational for website design.
jobs.gaps: No experience with web design tools (e.g., HTML, CSS, JavaScript, CMS like WordPress), portfolio, or formal design training.

jobs.title: Bartender - Brothers Bar & Grill,  Broad Ripple, Indianapolis, IN
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Teamwork and customer order skills are relevant to bartending, and you have a high school diploma.
jobs.gaps: No bartending experience, knowledge of drink recipes, or serving alcohol certification (e.g., TIPS).

jobs.title: Installation Apprentice
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Teamwork, basic computer skills, and being a team player are useful for an apprenticeship role that involves learning on the job.
jobs.gaps: No experience in installation, construction, or trade skills; you would need to demonstrate willingness to learn and physical stamina.
